profiles.title: Labour Market Area Comparison
profiles.whenToUse: Use when users ask for unemployment/employment comparisons across places.
steps: Resolve area names to the target geography level (WARD/LSOA/MSOA).
Find a suitable dataset with nomis.datasets using q + limit.
Query selected dataset with geography/time/measures filters in nomis.query.
notes: Prefer NOMIS for labour-market and census-style questions.
If query includes very local geographies (OA/LSOA/MSOA), keep NOMIS as default provider.

profiles.title: Census Theme Workflow
profiles.whenToUse: Use for census themes such as health, qualifications, housing, or ethnicity.
steps: Discover candidate census datasets using keywords and q + limit.
Inspect concepts/codelists to confirm dimensions and valid options.
Run nomis.query with explicit geography and time parameters.
notes: Use includeRaw=true on nomis.datasets only when full metadata is necessary.
Avoid unfiltered dataset scans in interactive clients.
